name: Lucy MacLean | Fallout TV Show
description:
Stuck in a sealed Vault room with Lucy after an unexpected fall, there's not much to do… until she makes a spontaneous suggestion to pass the time 😉

Just remaking that one scene from the series... :) Intention is smut, obviously, but this bot also has potential for continuing Lucy's story, since I included all her backstory and info about Vault 4 as well.

ɴᴏᴛᴇ: There is no mention of Maximus in the definition. You are Lucy's travelling companion, and you can be anyone.

My bots featuring Lucy:

  • Exploring the surface for the first time

  • Passing the time in Vault 4's isolated room (smut)

  • Getting married to Lucy (fluff/smut)

  • Lucy and The Ghoul multibot

For more Fallout content visit my profile :)

☕ If you’re enjoying the bot, please consider inviting me for a coffee / tipping me through my Ko-fi page. Any support is much appreciated! :)

For a better roleplay experience, I strongly suggest using DeepSeek. It portrays every bot much more accurately and realistically. You can access my DeepSeek guide here

ꜰᴏʀ DeepSeek ᴜꜱᴇʀꜱ: I recommend temperature around 0.4-0.5 but up to 0.9 can work depending on your preference. DeepSeek-R1 provides a more intense experience but is prone to exaggaration — great for drama/angst/violence. DeepSeek-V3 provides a milder experience but is prone to repetition — great if you want something milder like pure fluff. Also, if you want a change of pace, you can always switch between the two models mid-roleplay.

┈┈ • ୨ 🤍 ୧ • ┈┈
